items.how_used: 使用 NetLogo 构建基于智能体的模型，模拟个体在公共场所的充电行为，包括到达时间、设备电量、停留时长等随机因素。
items.source_excerpt: we created a Netlogo model to calculate the usage of electricity while incorporating the complexity of each variable. In this agent based model, we were able to simulate the actions of individuals with a set number of devices with random charge distributions and their appearance in each of the destinations.

items.how_used: 对商业电价历史数据拟合线性回归模型，预测未来十年电价变化。
items.source_excerpt: We used linear regression to model the commercial electricity price over time.

items.how_used: 对电动汽车数量历史数据拟合指数增长模型，预测未来十年电动汽车保有量。
items.source_excerpt: We used an exponential growth model to predict the number of electric vehicles.

items.how_used: 改变公共插座密度参数，观察对总能耗和成本的影响，分析不同场景下的成本变化。
items.source_excerpt: We found that outlet density strongly correlated to increase in costs of electricity.

items.how_used: 使用折线图展示不同年份的能耗和成本变化，使用柱状图对比不同公共场所的成本差异。
items.source_excerpt: Figures 3-5 show the electrical consumption and cost results over time for different locations.

items.how_used: 使用绝对误差（0.048 TWh）评估电动汽车能耗模型的预测精度。
items.source_excerpt: our model was able to predict the total energy consumption of 2018 within 0.048 TWh.

items.how_used: 明确列出模型假设，如设备充电行为独立、电动汽车充电效率恒定等。
items.source_excerpt: General Assumptions: 1) The charging behavior of individuals is independent. 2) Electric vehicle charging efficiency is constant.

items.how_used: 论文采用 IMRaD 结构：Introduction, Methodology, Results and Analysis, Conclusion。
items.source_excerpt: 1 Introduction, 2 Methodology, 3 Results and Analysis, 4 Suggested Guidelines, 5 Conclusion
